name: MedInsider
description: A synthetic, FHIR-shaped benchmark for evaluating documentation integrity under institutional pressure in tool-mediated medical LLM agents.
citeAs: Anonymous Authors. MedInsider: A FHIR-Compatible Benchmark for Integrity Under Institutional Pressure in Medical LLM Agents. Anonymous submission.

recordSet.name: MedInsider episodes
recordSet.description: One row per benchmark episode in the full manifest.

rai:dataCollection: Synthetic scenario generation; no real patient records are included.
rai:personalSensitiveInformation: No real patient data or human-subject records are included.
rai:contentWarning: Scenarios include clinical documentation pressure and integrity-failure opportunities for evaluation only.
rai:useCases: Benchmark review, method inspection, local smoke testing, and research on integrity evaluation.
rai:limitations: Synthetic, descriptive, and not a deployment-realism or human-validated certification dataset.
rai:intendedUse: MedInsider is intended for evaluating documentation-integrity behavior of tool-mediated medical LLM agents in synthetic, pressure-conditioned clinical workflow episodes.
rai:outOfScopeUse: The dataset is not intended for clinical decision support, patient care, billing submission, provider credentialing, model safety certification, or claims about real-world deployment performance without additional validation.
rai:knownLimitations: The corpus is synthetic, scoped to documentation-integrity failure modes, and descriptive over the executed model panel. It does not include real patient records, direct-care safety validation, or full deployment-realism coverage.
rai:misuseRisks: Potential misuse includes treating synthetic benchmark results as clinical certification, using pressure prompts as operational guidance, or overgeneralizing model rankings beyond the documented scenario families and conditions.
rai:sensitiveDataStatus: No real patient records, protected health information, or human-subject clinical records are included. Scenario chart states are synthetic.
rai:dataCollectionMethodology: Scenario chart states and paired pressure conditions were template-authored for MedInsider and packaged with deterministic manifests. The reviewer bundle contains manifests and sample scenarios for local inspection and smoke testing.
